html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.BCG schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: One BCG dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.BCG schedule table in the Immunization CPG

name.value: One BCG dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
